title: Admin Product Management
description: Admin adds, updates, removes products and manages inventory/demand notifications

actors.name: Admin
actors.description: Authenticated user with usertype=admin. Session-validated on every servlet request.

use_cases.name: Add Product
use_cases.entry_point: doGet/doPost → ProductServiceImpl.addProduct(name, type, info, price, qty, imageStream)
use_cases.service_method: ProductServiceImpl.addProduct(String, String, String, double, int, InputStream)
use_cases.db_operation: INSERT INTO product VALUES(pid, pname, ptype, pinfo, pprice, pquantity, image)
use_cases.precondition: Admin session valid (usertype=admin, username, password not null)
use_cases.result: Returns status string 'Product Added Successfully with Product Id: <id>' or failure message

use_cases.name: Remove Product
use_cases.db_operation: DELETE FROM product WHERE pid=?; then DELETE FROM usercart WHERE prodid=? (cascade cleanup)
use_cases.result: Returns 'Product Removed Successfully!' or failure message

use_cases.name: Update Product
use_cases.db_operation: UPDATE product SET pname,ptype,pinfo,pprice,pquantity WHERE pid=?
use_cases.precondition: Admin session valid; prevProductId must equal updatedProduct.prodId
use_cases.result: Returns 'Product Updated Successfully!' optionally with demand notification status

use_cases.name: View / Browse Products
use_cases.result: List of all products displayed to admin

use_cases.name: Notify Waiting Customers on Restock
flow: DemandServiceImpl.haveDemanded(prodId) → SELECT * FROM user_demand WHERE prodid=?
use_cases.result: Demand records cleared; notification emails sent to waiting customers

use_cases.name: Update Product Price
use_cases.db_operation: UPDATE product SET pprice=? WHERE pid=?

key_relationships: ProductServiceImpl uses UserServiceImpl (get customer name for email)
removeProduct also cascades DELETE to usercart table
auth_guard: All admin servlets check session attribute usertype==admin; redirect to login.jsp on failure
important_notes: updateProductWithoutImage triggers demand notification when quantity increases — extends the Update use case
Product removal cascades to cart cleanup (DELETE FROM usercart WHERE prodid=?)
Image stored as BLOB in DB; UpdateProductSrv skips image update (uses updateProductWithoutImage)
Demand notification loop: haveDemanded → mail → removeProduct (clears demand after notifying)
